cells.rationale: Bounded single-surface test addition against explicitly-named injectable seams and enumerated verdict branches — mechanical, do-exactly-this acceptance fits sonnet at medium.

Primary path introduces a dedicated off-drive suite worker into the autopilot daemon lifecycle with a subtle correctness invariant (identical deterministic merged OID derived outside the commit-work flock) — a contract-shaped, cross-cutting change warranting opus at xhigh.
